name: jihan-agents
description: Role-based skill suite for documentation lifecycle. Bundles notion-writer (authoring), verifier-on-sandbox (CLI command verification in disposable Ubuntu Docker), notion-doc-verifier (end-to-end Notion doc QA orchestrator), notion-verifier-gui (public URL + UI label checks), and notion-verifier-concept (prose review for dead links, missing steps, factual drift). Includes general-doc-rules and method-doc-rules base skills.

interface.shortDescription: Author and verify Notion how-to documents end to end
interface.longDescription: Authoring and verification suite for Notion how-to documentation. Generates pages with consistent doc rules, runs the doc's shell commands in a disposable Ubuntu sandbox, checks GUI walkthroughs against live public URLs, reviews prose for dead links and ambiguity, and posts findings as inline Notion comments.
defaultPrompt: Verify this Notion how-to doc end to end and post the findings as inline comments.
